_leia: Copie pra config/elenco.json. O agente monta no onboarding a partir das suas respostas. Cada descricao em INGLES e bem detalhada (o gpt-image-2 entende melhor) e SEMPRE igual, pra manter consistencia entre os videos. Inclua os 'NUNCA' de cada personagem pra travar a geracao.
estilo: ULTRA-DETAILED CINEMATIC 3D STYLE, premium movie-poster quality, soft volumetric lighting
ambiente: a modern, bright home-office studio with warm wood, plants and soft daylight; subtle depth and bokeh
paleta: warm neutrals, deep teal, soft orange accents; cinematic and clean

personagens.principal: ANA, the host: 30s Latina woman, shoulder-length wavy dark-brown hair, warm smile, wearing a mustard knit sweater, friendly confident vibe. NEVER change her hair color or outfit. NEVER an exaggerated cartoon.
personagens.mascote: PIXEL, a small round friendly robot, matte white body with a single glowing teal screen-face, short floating arms. NEVER an insect, NEVER scary, NEVER human-sized.

extras.cliente: diverse, happy everyday people, natural clothes
extras.tela: a floating holographic UI panel with simple charts and message bubbles

area_segura: IMPORTANTE: isso vira um video 16:9. Mantenha TODOS os personagens, rostos, logos e textos no centro (70%). Deixe as bordas de cima (~18%) e de baixo (~18%) so com ambiente, pra nada importante se perder no corte.
